item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Regarding the contents of the article, it's not terrible. The addendum went on well after the point that it became clear what was happening, the tone got a bit wonky in places, and the [REDACTED] just kind sits there for no reason. It's not a bad idea, but I was struggling to care about the bird or the smugglers or much of anything in the article. -1

I would actually like to see what happens when the -1's "grow up" from their chick form.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
SCP-3103's offspring have not yet been located. The Foundation has ordered a thorough search of New Guinea to locate the specimens, though they are very unlikely to be found due to the sheer size and amount of active trafficking rings in Africa.

You do know that New Guinea is not in Africa, right? New Guinea is an island north of Australia. Guinea, Guinea-Bissau and Equatorial Guinea are in Africa, but they are not called 'New Guinea'.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Did it immediately after posting, thanks anyways

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You should change the title of this page from "Scp 3103" to "SCP-3103" to conform with the proper naming standards here.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
image credit

After four rewrites I'm finally comfortable enough with this SCP to post it in the main list again (with hopefully better results). Thanks to everyone that gave me criticism and helped me improve it!
